svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="20"> <diagram name="Report Workflow" id="report-workflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1042" dy="751" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="simple-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#7F8C8D;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=0;arcSize=4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="680" width="280" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="simple-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2C3E50;" value="Simple Workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="240" x="60" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="simple-subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#566573;" value="No review step" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="240" x="60" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="draft_s" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5B041;strokeColor=#B9770E;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Draft" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="120" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="complete_s" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#58D68D;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=18;" value="Complete/Locked" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="105" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="es1" edge="1" parent="1" source="draft_s" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;" target="complete_s" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Submit Report (evaluator)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detailed-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#7F8C8D;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=0;arcSize=4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="680" width="700" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detailed-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2C3E50;" value="Detailed Workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="660" x="380" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detailed-subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#566573;" value="With review and acknowledgement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="660" x="380" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="draft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5B041;strokeColor=#B9770E;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Draft" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="620" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="waiting" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E86C1;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Waiting for Review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="600" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="viewed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#AED6F1;strokeColor=#2874A6;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Viewed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="620" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sealed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#58D68D;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=18;" value="Complete/Locked" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="609" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="draft" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="waiting" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Submit Report (evaluator)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="waiting" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;" target="viewed" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">View Report (evaluatee)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="viewed" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="sealed" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Acknowledge Report (evaluatee)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="waiting" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#E67E22;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="sealed" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#6E4018;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;border:1px solid #E67E22;">Mark Complete (evaluator)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="870" y="335" /> <mxPoint x="870" y="665" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
